name: supabase-prod-checklist
description: Execute Supabase production deployment checklist covering RLS, key hygiene, connection pooling, backups, monitoring, Edge Functions, and Storage policies. Use when deploying to production, preparing for launch, or auditing a live Supabase project for security and performance gaps. Trigger with "supabase production", "supabase go-live", "supabase launch checklist", "supabase prod ready", "deploy supabase", "supabase production readiness".
